question: Can you build a legal basement suite?
answer: Yes. Building legal basement suites (also called accessory dwelling units or second units) is one of our specialties. A legal suite in Ontario must meet the Ontario Building Code requirements for fire separation (typically a fire-rated ceiling and walls), a proper means of egress (egress window or separate exterior door), a full bathroom, a kitchen, and separate metering where required. We manage the entire process — permit drawings, permit application, inspections, and build — so your suite is fully legal and insurable. A legal suite can significantly increase your home's value and rental income.
